item.name: Peking Duck Pancakes
item.ingredients: Crispy duck, hoisin sauce, and cucumber wrapped in thin pancakes.

item.name: Dim Sum Platter
item.ingredients: A mix of siu mai, har gow, and xiao long bao with dipping sauces.

item.name: A5 Wagyu Tataki
item.ingredients: Lightly seared premium wagyu with ponzu and truffle oil.

item.name: Lobster Tempura
item.ingredients: Delicate lobster pieces battered and fried, served with yuzu aioli.

item.name: Foie Gras Sushi
item.ingredients: Luxurious foie gras on sushi rice, caramelized with a torch.

item.name: Spicy Tuna Tartare on Crispy Rice
item.ingredients: Tuna tartare on crunchy rice with spicy mayo.

item.name: Vietnamese Fresh Spring Rolls
item.ingredients: Rice paper rolls with shrimp, herbs, and peanut dipping sauce.

item.name: Miso Black Cod Skewers
item.ingredients: Buttery black cod marinated in miso, grilled to perfection.

item.name: Beef Bulgogi
item.ingredients: Sweet and savory marinated beef, grilled to perfection.

item.name: Char Siu BBQ Pork
item.ingredients: Cantonese-style roasted pork with honey glaze.

item.name: Kung Pao Chicken
item.ingredients: Spicy stir-fried chicken with peanuts and dried chilies.

item.name: Malaysian Laksa
item.ingredients: Spicy coconut noodle soup with seafood.

item.name: Pad Thai with Jumbo Prawns
item.ingredients: Classic Thai noodles with tamarind sauce.

item.name: Teriyaki Salmon
item.ingredients: Grilled salmon with teriyaki glaze and sesame seeds.

item.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
item.ingredients: Rich, creamy pork broth ramen with chashu.

item.name: Vietnamese Hainanese
item.ingredients: Tender chicken with fragrant rice and dipping sauces.

item.name: Sichuan Chili Lobster
item.ingredients: Lobster cooked in a numbing Sichuan peppercorn sauce.

item.name: Japchae
item.ingredients: A Korean stir-fried glass noodle dish made with marinated beef.

item.name: Kalbi
item.ingredients: Grilled short ribs marinated in a rich soy-garlic sauce.

item.name: Singapore Chili Crab
item.ingredients: Sweet and spicy crab dish with fried mantou buns.

item.name: Sushi And Sashimi Omakase
item.ingredients: Chef’s choice of premium sushi and sashimi.

item.name: Thai Green Curry
item.ingredients: Creamy coconut curry with aromatic spices

item.name: Truffle Fried Rice Caviar
item.ingredients: Luxurious fried rice infused with truffle oil.

item.name: Vietnames Shaking Beef
item.ingredients: Vietnamese dish features tender beef cubes that are marinated and stir-fried.

item.name: Lychee Mojito
item.ingredients: Lychee, mint, and rum with a refreshing twist.

item.name: Jasmine Honey Tea
item.ingredients: Floral jasmine tea with honey and lemon.

item.name: Matcha Martini
item.ingredients: A fusion of matcha and vodka with a creamy finish.

item.name: Sake Sangria
item.ingredients: A mix of sake, fruits, and citrus.

item.name: Thai Iced Tea
item.ingredients: Sweet, creamy, and fragrant Thai milk tea.

item.name: Soju Watermelon Punch
item.ingredients: Refreshing soju cocktail in a watermelon bowl.

item.name: Yuzu Spritz
item.ingredients: Sparkling yuzu with prosecco and elderflower.

item.name: lemon Mint
item.ingredients: A refreshing citrusy blend of lemon and mint, served chilled for a cool, zesty boost.

item.name: Miso Caramel Pudding
item.ingredients: Creamy pudding with a salted miso caramel topping.

item.name: Japanese Cheesecake
item.ingredients: Light and fluffy cotton cheesecake topped with berries and honey.

item.name: Thai Mango Sticky Rice
item.ingredients: Sweet coconut-infused sticky rice with fresh mango.

item.name: Mochi Ice Cream Trio
item.ingredients: Soft mochi stuffed with premium ice cream.

item.name: mooncake
item.ingredients: Traditional Chinese pastries with rich fillings like lotus seed paste.

item.name: Bingsu (Korean Shaved Ice)
item.ingredients: Fluffy shaved ice with fruit, red bean, and condensed milk.

item.name: Yuzu Sorbet
item.ingredients: Refreshing citrus sorbet with a hint of tartness.

item.name: Matcha Lava Cake
item.ingredients: Rich green tea-infused lava cake baked with fresh butter.
